name: AntV X6

en.when_to_use: Use it instead of hand-written SVG when you need ports, marquee selection, snap alignment, and extensible SVG/HTML nodes in an ER diagram, flowchart, or DAG editor, because native implementations fail at complex direct manipulation, port routing, and graph-state consistency; not for automatic layout, workflow execution, or persistence services.
en.why_valuable: AI can produce only static SVG by default, not production-grade marquee selection, ports, snap routing, and serializable editing state; X6's native Graph keeps these engineering capabilities and fromJSON/toJSON round trips in one model.

data_in.note: graph.fromJSON() accepts both {nodes,edges} metadata and the {cells} returned by graph.toJSON(); the catalog's primary input format is {nodes,edges}. Do not mix the two forms in one object.

nodes.attrs?: object -- inherits the shape styles by default

edges.attrs?: object -- inherits the edge styles by default

oneOf.cells: CellProperties[] -- native round-trip shape from graph.toJSON(); nodes contain position/size and edges contain source/target

spec.note: X6 Graph requires pixel width and height. This entry defaults to height 420px and reads the container width during initialization; rule 3 prohibits vh/percentage height. When the container changes, the consuming AI should call graph.resize(width,height).

when_to_use: 需要 ER 图、流程图或 DAG 编辑器中的连接桩、框选、吸附对齐与可扩展 SVG/HTML 节点时用它而非手写 SVG,因为原生在复杂直接操纵、端口路由和图状态一致性上失败;非做自动布局、流程执行或持久化服务。
why_valuable: AI 默认只能产出静态 SVG,做不到生产级框选、连接桩、吸附路由和可序列化编辑状态;X6 原生 Graph 把这些工程能力与 fromJSON/toJSON 往返集中到同一模型。

data_in.note: graph.fromJSON() 同时接受 {nodes,edges} 元数据与 graph.toJSON() 返回的 {cells};目录主写入格式选 {nodes,edges},二者不要混在同一对象。

nodes.attrs?: object —— 默认继承 shape 样式
nodes.ports?: PortMetadata[] | {groups?:object(默认 {}),items?:PortMetadata[](默认 [])} —— 默认无端口

edges.attrs?: object —— 默认继承 edge 样式

oneOf.cells: CellProperties[] —— graph.toJSON() 的原生回读形状;节点含 position/size,边含 source/target

spec.note: X6 Graph 需要像素宽高,本条默认 height 420px 并在初始化时读取容器宽度;铁律 3 禁 vh/百分比高,容器变化时消费 AI 应调用 graph.resize(width,height)。

example._why: X6 的 NodeMetadata/EdgeMetadata 与回读 CellProperties 是双形状深 config,minimal 固定易写的 {nodes,edges} 分支。

uplink.artifact: artifact 无上行;消费 AI 可把 graph.toJSON() 的 {cells} JSON 做下载或复制兜底,该对象可直接再次 fromJSON。
uplink.widget: 消费 AI 自行读取 graph.toJSON() 并拼 sendPrompt 文案;本条不绑定统一回调。
uplink.codex: 消费 AI 自行读取 graph.toJSON() 后调用 sendFollowUpMessage;本条不绑定统一回调。

carriers.widget: supported:core SVG/HTML 渲染与 dist CSS 可落同一 shadow;Stencil/Selection/Snapline 等独立插件未在本条预装
carriers.codex: supported:ESM CDN + SVG/DOM,core 无 React/worker/wasm peer

isolation.evidence: css-loader/index.js 实测:createElement('style') + document.querySelector('head').insertBefore(styleElement,head.firstChild) → 硬注 document.head(globalStyleInjection=yes)。boot 仅 core+Selection+Snapline,渲进 container、无 body portal(未装 Stencil/ContextMenu/Tooltip)→ globalDomMutation=no。拖拽/框选在 document 挂 mousemove/mouseup 属瞬时监听,pointerup 即移除、graph.dispose() 兜底,无持久泄漏 → globalEvents=no。shadowCompatible=conditional:SVG 图可渲进 shadow,但 X6 强制向 document.head 注样式(非零足迹)且 head 样式不达 shadow 内容,widget 需额外把样式 adopt 进 shadow。
